summary: Retest of iter 190 fixes — both fixes verified working. (1) Client360View Rebalance tab now renders PortfolioRebalancing content correctly. (2) /client-portal now correctly maps to DashboardRouter and renders SimpleClientView with all 8 tabs. Regression on /dashboard also confirmed.

fix_1_client360_rebalance_tab.snippet: Rebalancing Recommended... drifted 50.8%... Total Portfolio $3,645,000... Total Drift 50.8%... Trades Suggested 5... Analysis / Target Allocation / Rebalancing Trades / Settings

critical_code_review_comments: Recharts ResponsiveContainer width(-1)/height(-1) warnings appear repeatedly on Client360View and SimpleClientView when charts mount in hidden TabsContent (Radix Tabs unmount inactive panels by default; even so the parent container computes negative size at first render). Non-blocking but pollutes console. Consider lazy-mounting charts when tab becomes active or wrap in a div with explicit min-height.
test_credentials: No auth required. localStorage: wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='client'|'adviser', selected_client=JSON for adviser flows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both iter 190 bugs are fixed. Client360View.jsx now has the <TabsContent value='rebalance'> block (line 103-105) wrapping PortfolioRebalancing embedded — verified rendering with $3.645M portfolio, 50.8% drift, 5 trades. AppRouter.jsx /client-portal now points to DashboardRouter (line 209) — verified SimpleClientView renders with all 8 tabs in client mode. /dashboard regression confirmed identical. Only minor non-blocking Recharts ResponsiveContainer width warnings in console.
rca of the issue: Both bugs from iter 190 confirmed fixed by the two surgical changes E1 made. No regressions detected.
